Klasse Article

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.classes.Article
public class Article extends Object
Represents a catalog article with inventory and pricing data.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung

    Creates a new article instance.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Article

      public Article(String articleNumber, String name, String details, int stockQuantity, int minStockLevel, double sellPrice, double purchasePrice, String vendorName)
      Creates a new article instance.
      Parameter:
      articleNumber - unique article identifier
      name - display name
      details - optional description
      stockQuantity - current stock quantity
      minStockLevel - minimum stock level threshold
      sellPrice - sales price per unit
      purchasePrice - purchase price per unit
      vendorName - vendor or supplier name

  • Methodendetails
